tasks.subject: UC-SCR-01-ios: IdleScreen — iOS SwiftUI
tasks.description:
# UC-SCR-01-ios: `IdleScreen` — map + greeting overlay + chat input with suggestions — iOS SwiftUI

**Sprint:** [Sprint 6: Navigator Screens & Sandbox Hardening](SPRINT.md)
**Agent:** swift-implementer
**Estimate:** 120 min
**Type:** FEATURE
**Status:** Backlog
**Priority:** P0
**Effort:** M
**PRD Refs:** UC-SCR-01

**Full Task File:** `.spec/tasks/sprint-06-navigator-screens-and-sandbox-hardening/UC-SCR-01-ios-idle-screen.md`

## Objective
Render the dormant Navigator `IdleScreen` template on iOS as a story sourced entirely from `IdleMockProvider`, composing existing organisms via `LSMapLayer` slots.

## Key Constraints
- Register via native-sandbox `Story` API at `tier: .template` and aggregate into `TemplateStories.all`
- Source every color/spacing/typography/motion value from `LaneShadowTheme` — STRICTLY no literal values
- Inject all data exclusively via `IdleMockProvider` — NEVER call Convex, network, persistence
- Compose only via `LSMapLayer` slots — NEVER reach inside organism internals

## Acceptance Criteria (6 ACs)
1. Idle composition renders (map, greeting overlay, chat input with 4 chips + badge)
2. Suggestion tap fires callback
3. Trailing icon swap on input
4. Hamburger stub fires
5. Light/dark token re-resolution
6. No data fetching in template

**See full task file for detailed AC verification commands and TDD requirements.**

tasks.subject: UC-SCR-01-android: IdleScreen — Android Compose
tasks.description:
# UC-SCR-01-android: `IdleScreen` — map + greeting overlay + chat input with suggestions — Android Compose

**Sprint:** [Sprint 6: Navigator Screens & Sandbox Hardening](SPRINT.md)
**Agent:** kotlin-implementer
**Estimate:** 120 min
**Type:** FEATURE
**Status:** Backlog
**Priority:** P0
**Effort:** M
**PRD Refs:** UC-SCR-01

**Full Task File:** `.spec/tasks/sprint-06-navigator-screens-and-sandbox-hardening/UC-SCR-01-android-idle-screen.md`

## Objective
Render the dormant Navigator IdleScreen on Android with map, greeting overlay (label + opinion-serif headline with italicized "today"), top bar, and chat input with 4 suggestion chips + location badge — fully driven by `IdleMockProvider`.

## Key Constraints
- Source ALL visual values from LaneShadowTheme tokens — NEVER hardcode values
- Register the story via native-sandbox Story API at `tier: ComponentTier.template` with id `templates.idle.default`
- STRICTLY no live Convex / no data fetching inside the screen — all data comes from `IdleMockProvider`
- Add the story to `TemplateStories.all` so the sandbox aggregator picks it up

## Acceptance Criteria (6 ACs)
1. Idle screen composition renders
2. Suggestion chip tap updates input
3. Trailing icon swap on input
4. Hamburger menu fires stub callback
5. Light/dark theme re-resolution
6. No data fetching code in screen

**See full task file for detailed AC verification commands and TDD requirements.**

tasks.subject: UC-SCR-02-ios: PlanningScreen — iOS SwiftUI
tasks.description:
# UC-SCR-02-ios: `PlanningScreen` — sketching polyline + phase indicator + thinking chat — iOS SwiftUI

**Sprint:** [Sprint 6: Navigator Screens & Sandbox Hardening](SPRINT.md)
**Agent:** swift-implementer
**Estimate:** 180 min
**Type:** FEATURE
**Status:** Backlog
**Priority:** P0
**Effort:** L
**PRD Refs:** UC-SCR-02

**Full Task File:** `.spec/tasks/sprint-06-navigator-screens-and-sandbox-hardening/UC-SCR-02-ios-planning-screen.md`

## Objective
Render the `PlanningScreen` template on iOS with sketching polyline animation, 5-step phase indicator, and thinking-state chat — fully driven by `PlanningMockProvider`.

## Key Constraints
- Register via native-sandbox `Story` API at `tier: .template` with id `templates.planning.thinking`
- Source all visual values from `LaneShadowTheme` — STRICTLY no literals
- All data from `PlanningMockProvider` — no Convex, no networking
- Compose via `LSMapLayer` slots only

## Acceptance Criteria (8 ACs)
1. Planning composition renders (map, phase indicator, chat input)
2. Sketching polyline loop animation runs
3. Active phase dot pulses (motion.recipe.phaseDotPulse)
4. Thinking state shows spinner
5. Phase indicator visual correctness
6. Map fills canvas with route hints
7. Surface area available for chat input
8. No data fetching code

**See full task file for detailed AC verification.**
